summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 5 features - all 5 new features working perfectly. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and integrations functional.
passed_tests: JWT admin authentication with Bearer and X-Admin-Token headers
Rate limiting on admin login (5 attempts/10min per IP, 429 response)
Admin evolution API with 7d/30d/90d range selectors
Admin delete whitelist entries with confirmation dialog
Hero image variants cycling automatically with crossfade
Manual hero variant switching via dots (SERIOUS/MEME/GLITCH)
All 3 hero image files accessible (200 status)
All regression features (chat, prophecy, whitelist, stats, countdown)
